waiver.tooltip: I understand that participating in this event involves inherent risks, including the possibility of injury or loss. By checking this box, I confirm that I have read and agree to the Waiver and Release of Liability, and I voluntarily accept these risks and release the organizers from any claims related to my participation.

applicationForm.fillRequiredFields: Please fill in the following required field: {fields}
applicationForm.infoNotSharedTitle: Info I'm NOT willing to share with other attendees
applicationForm.infoNotSharedSubtitle: We will make a directory to make it easier for attendees to coordinate
applicationForm.step2: 2. Decide on coming solo / with a residency, then book accommodation.
applicationForm.existingCardDescription: We've found a previous application associated with your email.
applicationForm.existingCardImportQuestion: Would you like to import your previous application data? This will save you time by pre-filling the form with your existing information.
applicationForm.personalInfoSubtitle: Your basic information helps us identify and contact you.
applicationForm.telegramSubtitle: The primary form of communication during {cityName} will be a Telegram group, so create an account if you don't already have one
applicationForm.residenceSubtitle: Please format it like [City, State/Region, Country]. Feel free to put multiple cities if you live in multiple places.
applicationForm.referralSubtitle: List everyone who encouraged you to apply.
applicationForm.latamCitizen: Are you a LATAM citizen / San Martin resident?
applicationForm.professionalSubtitle: Tell us about your professional background and current role.
applicationForm.orgSubtitle: If you're just exploring something independently, note that.
applicationForm.currentBuilding: What are you currently building / working on / reaching or obsessed in?
applicationForm.githubSubtitle: Show us what you are working on!
applicationForm.areasSubtitle: Please list your top professional skills, areas of expertise, and/or spheres of influence (i.e. sustainable energy, AI R&D, neuropsychology and BMIs, cryptocurrency and blockchain development, etc).
applicationForm.experienceGoals: What excites you about muShanghai? What are you planning to build / achieve / learn from this experience?
applicationForm.proudProjects: What Projects or Achievement are you super proud of in the past?
applicationForm.otherInterests: What else are you in to?
applicationForm.participationSubtitle: We understand that your plans may change. We are collecting the following information just to get a sense of capacity of each day/week.
applicationForm.bhutanAvailabilityLabel: I confirm my availability for Sept 14-21, 2025
applicationForm.bhutanAvailabilitySubtitle: We can only accept participants who are able to join for the entire trip length from September 14-21. Please confirm your availability for these dates.
applicationForm.durationSubtitle: Please share how long you intend to come.
applicationForm.builderBoolean: Are you a builder/developer interested in creating open-source software at {cityName}?
applicationForm.builderDescription: Elaborate on your role as a builder/developer if you said yes.
applicationForm.hackathonInterest: We will have a hackathon at {cityName}. Do you think you'll want to take part?
applicationForm.investor: Are you a venture capitalist / investor coming to source deals?
applicationForm.personalGoals: What are your goals in attending {cityName}?
applicationForm.bhutanGoals: What are your goals for Edge Bhutan 2025 and why do you want to join?
applicationForm.bhutanContribute: What is something you could contribute? A workshop, a talk, an area of expertise. Get creative!
applicationForm.hostSession: What topic would you choose if you were to host a session for {cityName}?
applicationForm.hostSessionSubtitle: This is just to get a sense of the topics you're interested in.
applicationForm.scholarshipSubtitle: Fill out this section if you are interested in securing one of a limited number of scholarships for {cityName}. We are prioritizing scholars who apply for the full experience{dates}.
applicationForm.scholarshipRequest: Are you interested in applying for a scholarship?
applicationForm.paymentCapacity: I can comfortably cover up to:
applicationForm.scholarshipVideoUrl: [Required] Please share a ~60 second video answering why you're applying for a scholarship and what your contribution might be. If you are applying for a scholarship and want to receive a ticket discount, this video is mandatory.
applicationForm.videoUploadSubtitle: You can upload your video to Dropbox, Google Drive, Youtube, or anywhere where you can make the link public and viewable.
applicationForm.scholarshipDetails: If you want to add any more detail in written form, you can use this textbox (you will still need to upload the video above, even if you fill this out).
applicationForm.volunteerText: If you are interested in volunteering in exchange for a 50% discount (20h/week) or 100% discount (40h/week), please apply via
applicationForm.bookedQuestion: Have you booked your accommodation in Hotel Magdalena via
applicationForm.confirmationSubtitle: Please submit your booking confirmation for Hotel Magdalena here. Make sure we can see your name and booking dates.
applicationForm.spouseInfo: Name of spouse/partner + duration of their stay
applicationForm.spouseInfoSubtitle: We will approve your spouse/partner if we approve you. However please have them fill out this form as well so we have their information in our system.
applicationForm.spouseEmailSubtitle: Please provide your spouse/partner's email so we can remind them to apply.
applicationForm.kidsApprovalNote: We will approve your kids if we approve you. Your kids do not need to fill out their own version of this form however.
applicationForm.patagoniaSubtitle: You can attend The Mu solo, join an existing residency, or start your own.
applicationForm.describeWork: Please describe your current work or project, including the tech stack and tools you are using.
applicationForm.findResidencies: Find all residencies open for applications
applicationForm.submitProposal: Submit a proposal for your own residency
applicationForm.videoLabel: Please record a 1-2 minute video sharing your quick response to the
applicationForm.videoNoFillNote: (you don't have to fill them in below if you add the video)
applicationForm.videoGoalsQuestion: - What are your goals for {cityName} and why do you want to join?
applicationForm.videoContributeQuestion: - What is something you could contribute? A workshop, a talk, an area of expertise. Get creative!
applicationForm.videoUploadNote: You can upload your video to Dropbox, Google Drive, Youtube, or anywhere where you can make the link public and viewable
applicationForm.shareKids: Whether or not I'm bringing kids

applicationForm.toastSubmitErrorDescription: There was an error submitting your application. Please try again.
